name: arshavinel/padel-minitour
description: Source code of ARSH Padel MiniTour platform

scripts.test:lint: php -r "$files=glob('tests/**/*.php'); foreach($files as $f){$c=file_get_contents($f); if(strpos($f,'RecordingGenerator.php')!==false) continue; if(preg_match('/->generate\s*\(/', $c)) {fwrite(STDERR, \"Forbidden ->generate() in $f\\n\"); exit(1);}} exit(0);"
